message:
fix(alloc): eliminate panic in bitmap_find_contiguous for empty bitmaps

- Added bounds check in bitmap_find_contiguous_linear: byte_idx < bitmap.len() before accessing bitmap[byte_idx].
- Prevents panic when scanning contiguous runs in undersized or empty bitmaps.
- Verified via existing proptest_empty_bitmap_nonzero_count_has_no_free.
- Closed bd-xh0u and bd-oflc (duplicate).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
